title: [IOS]Onboarding - Organized page has a continue button
scenario: Onboarding flow shows Poly Lens Login screen after accepting license agreement and tapping Continue on the Organized page
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. On the onboarding flow, accept the License Agreement and Privacy Policy.
3. Observe the screen that appears after acceptance.
4. Tap the 'Continue' button on the 'Organized' page.
5. Observe the screen that appears after tapping Continue.
expected: After accepting the license agreement and privacy policy, the "Organized" page is displayed with a "Continue" button and text about Poly Lens location tracking. Tapping Continue leads to the POLY LENS Login screen with Login and Continue as Guest options.
